prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约9702名→11205名→13603名→19164名→15422名，整体呈持续后移趋势，2024年达到峰值后2025年有所回升；近5年累计后移约5 720名，波动幅度较大；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021–2023年稳定在108–110人，2024年扩至126人，2025年略降至122人，2026年进一步扩至128人， 较2025年增加6人，扩幅约4.9%，有助于缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第65名持续上升至2026年第57名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实 力和认可度增强；2025年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面（教授考核事件），但影响有限；抖音热度排名第73，评价一般；未见明显投档断档记录；法学A、应用经济学A-，与物理类招生的法学类、金融学类、财政学类等专业对应；计算机类、统计学类虽无单独学科评级，但属于社会热门方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类2024年社会热度为推荐，电子信息/通信为高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化为高热推荐，工科专业整体热度较高，对物理类考生吸引力强；湖南省2026年物理类考生约34. 7万人，较2025年32.0万人增加约8.4%，竞争有所加剧；省控线2025年为405分，较2024年422分下降，反映试卷难度可能上升；该校位于湖北武汉，与湖南相邻 ，地域偏好较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回升、2026年招生计划扩招4.9%、物理类考生数增加8.4%基本对冲、学校排名持续上升 及工科专业热度高增强吸引力等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在2025年15422名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约15907名，区间15407–16407名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 9702 → 11205 → 13603 → 19164 → 15422, showing a continuous backward trend overall, peaking in 2024 and rebounding in 2025; the cumulative backward shift over the past 5 years is about 5,720 places, with significant fluctuations. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province was stable at 108–110 from 2021 to 2023, expanded to 126 in 2024, slightly decreased to 122 in 2025, and further expanded to 128 in 2026, an increase of 6 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 4.9%, which helps alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, reflecting the university's comprehensive strength and increasing recognition. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was slightly negative (professor assessment incident), but the impact was limited. Douyin popularity ranking is 73rd, with average reviews. No obvious enrollment gaps or breaks were recorded. Law is rated A, Applied Economics A-, corresponding to majors such as Law, Finance, and Public Finance in Physics Category. Computer Science and Statistics, though without individual discipline ratings, are socially popular directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of Computer Science is recommended, Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended, and Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended. Engineering majors overall have high popularity, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates. In 2026, Hunan Province has about 347,000 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. The provincial control line in 2025 was 405 points, down from 422 points in 2024, reflecting a possible increase in exam difficulty. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, adjacent to Hunan, with strong regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the rebound in 2025 rankings, the 4.9% enrollment expansion in 2026, the 8.4% increase in Physics Category candidates which largely offsets, the continuous rise in university rankings, and the high popularity of engineering majors enhancing attractiveness, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 15422. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15907, with a range of 15407–16407.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 15407–16407, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Law Class, Statistics Class, Computer Class, Public Finance Class) as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship/experimental class majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 15407), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1697 → 1901 → 1913 → 2427 → 1499, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing; in 2025, the ranking rebounded significantly to 1499, a rebound of about 928 places from 2024, the best level in the past five years; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan Province was stable at 82–84 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 79 in 2025, and slightly increased to 80 in 2026, an increase of 1 student compared to 2025, an expansion of about 1.3%, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation was slightly negative, involving a controversy over the fairness of professor assessments, but the impact was limited; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 73rd, rated as average, with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no obvious application heat signal; no historical abnormal admission records for this university; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Law was rated A and Applied Economics A-, both flagship disciplines, highly corresponding to the admission majors such as Law, Finance, and Public Finance, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social heat of Law major was differentiated and wait-and-see, Finance/Economics majors were also differentiated and wait-and-see, overall heat was stable but differentiated; in 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Hunan Province is about 187,000, a significant increase of about 31% from 143,000 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition; the provincial control line in 2025 was 446 points, up from 438 points in 2024, reflecting an overall increase in competition level; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, adjacent to Hunan, with strong regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound of the 2025 ranking to a recent high, the 2026 enrollment plan only slightly expands by 1 student, the 31% surge in History Category candidates in Hunan Province intensifying competition, and the university's continuously rising ranking enhancing attractiveness, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly decline from the 2025 ranking of 1499; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1530, with a range of 1255–1805.
